sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73640" key="o(moiokatalhktw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμοιοκατα-ληκτώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n73640.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">given to the use of phrases with similar endings,</tr_> of the style of Gorgias and Isocrates, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Vit.Isoc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.257</biblScope> </bibl> W.</sense> </entryFree>
